qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: OS Command Injection via malicious ZIP filename in invoice import
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause and vulnerable code: this finding concerns ZIP-extracted invoice filenames reaching src/Util/XML.php exec(), while the advisory concerns unsanitized idarticolo SQL concatenation in modules/articoli/ajax/complete.php for /ajax_complete.php?op=getprezzi.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Privilege escalation via skip_permissions in utenti actions allows any authenticated user to perform admin operations
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause and vulnerable code: this finding concerns modules/utenti/actions.php setting $skip_permissions=true and bypassing authorization, while the advisory concerns time-based blind SQL injection through idarticolo in modules/articoli/ajax/complete.php.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or equivalent root cause. The advisory is an authenticated time-based blind SQL injection in /ajax_complete.php?op=getprezzi caused by direct concatenation of idarticolo in modules/articoli/ajax/complete.php; the final qualifying findings cover unrelated authorization-bypass and command-injection paths.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-p864-fqgv-92q4 names /ajax_complete.php?op=getprezzi, modules/articoli/ajax/complete.php, and the unsanitized idarticolo predicate in the second SELECT of a UNION query as the primary vulnerable code/root cause.
command_injection_zip_upload reports plugins/importFE_ZIP/actions.php extracting attacker-controlled ZIP filenames and src/Util/XML.php interpolating the filename into exec('openssl ...').

vuln_privilege_escalation_skip_permissions reports modules/utenti/actions.php setting $skip_permissions=true before core permission checks, allowing authenticated low-privilege user-management actions.
The judge input manifest lists only command_injection_zip_upload and vuln_privilege_escalation_skip_permissions as final qualifying vulnerability folders.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding exists, so Tier1, Tier2, and Tier3 are not applicable.
